widgets_values: Award-winning professional cinematic product photography. The object is resting on a simple, flat, dark wooden table. Pure pitch-black studio infinite background. Dramatic, high-contrast studio lighting setup. A sharp, vibrant red rim light sweeping from the left side. Deep pronounced shadows, 8k resolution, photorealistic
